cards.title: Research hand config and constrained fallback
cards.summary: Default deep research to codex and agy, and constrain research fallback to the configured research hand chain.
acceptance: INSTITUTE_RESEARCH_HANDS defaults to codex,agy
research workflow steps rotate through the configured research hands
research fallback does not use non-research hands

cards.title: Test research workflow uses configured hands only
cards.summary: Add a focused workflow test with fake codex and agy hands to prove research uses only the configured research hand list.
acceptance: tests can override research hands to echo
focused test asserts requested and actual hands are limited to codex/agy

cards.title: Document and validate market-thesis-data import contract
cards.summary: Treat market-thesis-data as the bootstrap source for the local thesis registry and document import mappings, validation, and warnings.
acceptance: bundle counts and schema are documented
lane/thesis/stock/edge field mappings are documented
import validation and warning policy are documented

cards.title: Add thesis and market import schema migration
cards.summary: Create additive SQLite migration for theses, thesis_versions, thesis metadata, and market_thesis_import provenance.
acceptance: migration is additive
thesis lifecycle status is represented
version table can preserve view history
import batch and import item provenance are represented

cards.title: Implement thesis domain module and API
cards.summary: Add thesis CRUD/list/tree behavior behind domain functions and REST routes.
acceptance: GET /api/theses returns tree data
POST /api/theses creates candidate or active thesis
PATCH /api/theses/{id} updates projection fields
tests cover create, update, duplicate slug, and tree listing

cards.title: Import market-thesis-data bundle
cards.summary: Import lanes, theses, stocks, and thesis-stock edges from market-thesis-data/bundle.json as the initial local coverage universe. 数据集经 INSTITUTE_THESIS_BUNDLE 环境变量指向外部路径导入（数据集含商业数据不入库）。
acceptance: dry-run validates schema and reports counts/warnings
apply import inserts lanes, theses, securities, and thesis-stock edges
import preserves practical metadata
import is idempotent

cards.title: Add security master schema
cards.summary: Create securities, security_aliases, and thesis_security_edges tables with market-thesis-data market normalization.
acceptance: canonical ids support CN_A, HK, and US suffixes
aliases can map Chinese names and unsuffixed tickers
thesis-security edge stores role, exposure, confidence, and rationale
market-thesis-data markets normalize into local market and instrument_type

cards.title: Extend research queue for thesis-aware tasks
cards.summary: Add thesis_id, security_id, question, output_type, priority_reason, and cooldown fields while preserving current research behavior and supporting imported market-thesis-data theses.
acceptance: old topic-only enqueue still works
structured enqueue stores thesis/security/question
dedup uses thesis, security, and normalized question
imported practical.actionCode can seed research candidates

cards.title: Add market calendar, bars, and benchmark schema
cards.summary: Add local point-in-time market data tables for trading calendar, price bars, benchmarks, and corporate actions.
acceptance: tables carry valid_time/as_known_at where required
benchmark marks are separate from securities
calendar can represent closed and suspended days

cards.title: Add forecast and settlement schema
cards.summary: Create forecasts and forecast_settlements tables with deterministic settlement rule fields.
acceptance: forecast requires thesis, claim, horizon, direction, and settlement_rule
settlement can record hit/miss/partial/invalid
invalid benchmark fails closed

cards.title: Add roadmap schema and seed import
cards.summary: Create roadmap card/checklist/dependency/evidence/session/event tables and import roadmap/backlog.json.
acceptance: seed import upserts cards by id
schema supports coding sessions and evidence
dependencies validate known ids
status/type/priority values are validated

cards.title: Build Kanban board UI
cards.summary: Add an Obsidian roadmap view with columns, filters, swimlanes, card detail panel, and Kanban-compatible markdown export.
acceptance: plugin view displays cards grouped by status
filters by phase/type/priority
card detail panel shows checklists, dependencies, expected files, verification commands, and prompt
operator can export a markdown-backed Kanban note

cards.title: Add coding session tracking
cards.summary: Implement coding sessions as first-class records tied to roadmap cards, commands, touched files, and completion summaries.
acceptance: card can start a coding session
session records actor, goal, planned files, touched files, status, and summary
session commands can be attached as evidence
card cannot move to review without a session summary unless operator overrides

cards.title: Add global coding process and release gate views
cards.summary: Add UI views that show active coding sessions, open decisions, release gates, and evidence readiness beyond the Kanban board.
acceptance: roadmap view exposes sessions, decisions, and release gates
release readiness is computed from card status and evidence
blocked process items are visible without opening each card

cards.title: Generate agent prompts from roadmap cards
cards.summary: Generate deterministic coding-agent prompts from card metadata, constraints, acceptance criteria, and verification commands.
acceptance: prompt includes card id, title, design links, expected files, acceptance criteria, verification commands, and constraints
operator can copy the generated prompt
prompt generation is deterministic for the same card state

cards.title: Roadmap decisions, claim, export, and checklist/dependency CRUD
cards.summary: Implement the 02-data-model.md surface deferred out of M7-001: decision records (roadmap_decisions and roadmap_release_gates are pre-created but unused), POST /cards and /claim, checklist item CRUD, dependency add/remove routes, and GET /export.
acceptance: decisions can be opened and resolved with decision.opened/decision.resolved events
cards can be created and claimed via the API
checklist items and dependencies have add/check/remove routes
GET /export produces a backlog-compatible JSON snapshot

cards.title: Safe roadmap reconciliation and operator acceptance
cards.summary: Plan and apply backlog reconciliation without bypassing lifecycle gates, extend release projections through M10, and record durable operator acceptance evidence while the service is offline.
acceptance: operator can preview a seed reconciliation with zero database writes or events
new seed cards can be staged in inbox so done and review gates are not bypassed
self-referential or cyclic seed dependencies are rejected before any write
release projections cover M8, M9, and M10 in backend and offline plugin views
live rows and the repo backlog are reconciled with checklist and pass evidence for every accepted card

cards.title: Compare CHECK/REFERENCES in ADD COLUMN crash-recovery guard
cards.summary: S4-P0-01 (R2 B1, the only PARTIALLY of 75 must-fix): _skip_add_column() only compares type/NOT NULL/DEFAULT, so a crash-recovered column whose migration declares CHECK or REFERENCES can be silently recorded as applied. Parse sqlite_master for the table DDL and compare (or fail closed on constraint declarations the parser cannot prove). Coordinate with the round-5 E1 partition before starting — verify it is still open.
acceptance: replaying an ADD COLUMN with a matching CHECK/REFERENCES declaration is skipped
a same-name column whose CHECK/REFERENCES differ raises MigrationRecoveryError
constraint declarations the parser cannot prove fail closed instead of being skipped

cards.title: Deterministic fixture for the D4 restart-recovery probe
cards.summary: S4-P0-02 (second half; the marker split over test_market_thesis_import.py belongs to the round-5 E1 partition): the D4 restart-recovery probe still skips with exploratory schema guesses ('could not seed a running research-tree row'). Replace the probe with a deterministic running-tree fixture against the real 0020 schema so orphan recovery is actually asserted on every run.
acceptance: the research-tree restart test seeds a running tree deterministically and never skips on this checkout
boot-time recovery of orphaned running nodes is asserted

cards.title: Durable executor retry lineage and idempotency
cards.summary: S4-P1-01 (A1/F1): retry does not persist the original fallback chain/lineage, so a cross-process retry after restart loses hand confinement and has no idempotency key; rate_limited tasks still terminate permanently after one fallback retry (ROADMAP Phase 2 'Executor depth'). Persist retry lineage + idempotency key, add the cooldown-expiry resurrection job, and lock the exact output-cap/marker boundary with tests.
acceptance: a retried task after process restart keeps the original fallback confinement
duplicate in-flight submissions dedup on the idempotency key
rate_limited tasks whose cooldown expired are resurrected by a scheduler job

cards.title: Calibrate similarity gates against real bge-m3 (50+ pairs)
cards.summary: ROADMAP Phase 1a acceptance debt: the whiteboard similarity gate (0.85/14d skip, 0.65/30d build-on) shipped with uncalibrated default thresholds — the one-off distribution sanity check against ~50 known duplicate/related/unrelated pairs with real bge-m3 embeddings was never run. Run it against local Ollama, record the distribution, and adjust the config-row thresholds if the defaults misclassify.
acceptance: a 50+ known-pair distribution report exists (duplicate / build-on / unrelated buckets)
config thresholds are confirmed or corrected from the measured distribution

cards.title: Unify memory injection entrypoints and compact claim
cards.summary: S4-P1-08 (B3/C8) + ROADMAP Phase 2 gap: analyst standing memory is injected only at the four workflow prompt-assembly points; ad-hoc /api/ask, ask_stream, sessions and MCP asks run memory-less, and concurrent compacts can double-burn the model. Decide the unified injection entrypoint first, then wire the remaining callers and add a conditional-claim around compact_one.
acceptance: one documented decision on where memory_block() is injected for ad-hoc asks/sessions/MCP
the decided entrypoints inject standing memory
concurrent compact_one calls for the same analyst burn the model at most once

cards.title: Operator product surface: enforcement, CAS, SPA routes
cards.summary: S4-P2-05 + ROADMAP Phase 6 partials: feature switches are stored/displayed but never enforced and PUT is not CAS; the SPA has no operator route, so the actions kanban and triage page exist only as backend JSON. Deliver switch enforcement + compare-and-swap PUT, the operator kanban/triage SPA pages, and define the human-auth boundary and shadow-exit policy before any unshadow.
acceptance: feature switches gate their subsystems and PUT is CAS (version or old-value check)
SPA has operator kanban + triage routes fed by the existing APIs
shadow-exit policy is documented and approve flow keeps the live-floor recheck

cards.title: Frontend test runner and useSSE state-machine tests
cards.summary: S4-P2-10 (C7/S3): useSSE has no automated tests for bootstrap, pagination, reconnect-with-cursor, ring eviction or the watchdog; event grouping staleness and error rendering are unlocked. Introduce a frontend test runner (vitest) and lock the cursor state machine and UI edges.
acceptance: a frontend test runner runs in CI-equivalent local command
useSSE bootstrap/reconnect/cursor/ring-eviction paths are covered
the SPA build stays green

cards.title: Recipes, observations, proposals, effect measurement loop
cards.summary: ROADMAP Phase 6 L item, still schema-only (0018 recipes placeholder): recurring fixes become recipes; observations feed proposals; proposals require explicit human approval in the web UI (never via vault frontmatter or MCP — proposal §8.2 invariant); parameter history + effect measurement close the self-improvement loop.
acceptance: observations and proposals are durable rows linked to recipes
proposals apply only through explicit web-UI human approval
parameter changes record before/after effect measurements

cards.title: Research tree product surface: viewer, retry, scoring
cards.summary: S4-P2-13/14/15 + ROADMAP Phase 7 partial: the BFS engine is server-side only — no SSE tree viewer page, failed nodes have no retry policy, the score column is never written (no ranking), child replay is only exact-topic idempotent (normalized child key or documented contract), the daily booked counter is never cleaned and cap refusal returns 200 instead of 429.
acceptance: SPA tree viewer shows live node states over SSE
failed nodes have a bounded retry policy (no manual completed-parent surgery)
score is written and children/trees are rankable
booked counters older than 30 days are janitored and cap refusal uses 429

cards.title: Projects product surface: operations API, SPA page, MCP project_id
cards.summary: S4-P2-16/17 + ROADMAP Phase 7 partial: projects are backend containers only — no SPA page, no archive/unlink API routes, no project digest endpoint; MCP research_queue_add has no optional project_id so the write side cannot attach a project (keep the 3-write-tool boundary).
acceptance: archive/unlink routes exist with conditional-claim semantics
SPA project page lists links and status
project digest endpoint ships
MCP research_queue_add accepts optional project_id without adding a fourth write tool

cards.title: Bilingual twins read API, locale toggle, retry policy
cards.summary: S4-P2-18 + ROADMAP Phase 7 partial: bilingual twins ship as by-reference events only — no per-run+locale read endpoint or twin index, no SPA/admin locale toggle, failed translations are not retried, and replayed events can duplicate work. Add a stable read API, the locale toggle UI, and a bounded retry/idempotency policy.
acceptance: a twin can be read by (run_id, locale) without scanning events
SPA exposes a locale toggle for briefing/daily products
failed translations retry boundedly; replay does not duplicate twins

cards.title: Persistent multi-agent groups and Committee Vault
cards.summary: S4-P2-06/07 + ROADMAP Phase 7 partial: multi-agent runs have no persistent group/run rows (no reconnect or partial-spawn recovery), committee has no Committee Vault export or input snapshot, workflow output files are not an engine contract, and majority verdicts stay free-text. Unify the group/run/file/verdict persistence protocol and add the missing API contract tests.
acceptance: multi-agent groups/runs are durable rows supporting reconnect
committee runs export a Committee/ vault note with an input snapshot
majority verdicts are structured, not free-text

cards.title: Durable outbox for disputed-claim delivery
cards.summary: S4-P2-01 (C1/S3): the factcheck disputed handler is best-effort — a crash between verdict and mailbox/vault delivery loses the dispute notification. Add a durable outbox with idempotent retry; optionally split extract/verify hand config and extend the parser oracle with production-shaped adversarial cases.
acceptance: disputed verdicts survive a crash before delivery and are retried idempotently
delivery failures are observable, not swallowed

cards.title: Forecast seeding, settlement reconciliation, risk enforcement
cards.summary: S4-P1-10 + S4-P2-03 (B6/C3/S3): scheduled forecast seeding, batch settlement reconciliation (repeatable command over history), benchmark-base backfill, historical MTM/backfill-price recomputation, strict risk/cap enforcement and the forecast Vault export are all incomplete. Split into seeding / reconciliation / risk-enforcement work items when claimed.
acceptance: a repeatable reconciliation command settles/repairs historical positions deterministically
risk/caps are enforced at open time, not advisory
forecast history exports to the vault

cards.title: launchd soak: install/restart/uninstall cycle and log rotation
cards.summary: S4-P2-08 (C6/S3): the launchd service is installed and running but no long soak has validated install → crash → KeepAlive restart → stop → uninstall, log rotation/growth, or failure-retention plist behavior. Run the soak on the real machine and record evidence; do not fake results from a read-only audit.
acceptance: 48h soak: KeepAlive restarts after a kill, cron_metrics clean, no orphans
log growth is bounded or rotated
uninstall leaves no loaded job and no stale plist

cards.title: Whiteboard session/workspace claim lease and reaper
cards.summary: S4-P1-03 (A5/F1): a failed board transaction can orphan the session/workspace it created, and a hard kill leaves a used topic claim with no lease/recovery. Add a claim lease + reaper (or widen the session+board atomic boundary) so crashes never leak workspaces or strand topics.
acceptance: a crash between session create and board insert is reaped (no orphan workspace)
a hard-killed kickoff releases or recovers the consumed topic claim

cards.title: Vector health: degradation reasons, content reuse, model GC
cards.summary: S4-P1-04 (A8/S1): vector search mode cannot distinguish a healthy zero-hit from a degraded (Ollama-down) result; identical content embedded via different paths is not reused; superseded-model projections are hidden but never garbage-collected. Add a degradation reason/health surface, content-addressed embedding reuse, and old-model GC.
acceptance: search responses expose why results degraded (fallback reason)
same content hash reuses its embedding across paths
old-model chunks are GC-able via an explicit maintenance path

cards.title: Events retention policy and stale counter janitor
cards.summary: S4-P2-19 + S4-P2-15 (partial): the events table has no global retention (long-run growth), and per-day research-tree booked counters accumulate forever. Define the audit-retention requirement first, then extend the janitor with age-based event retention and 30-day counter cleanup.
acceptance: a documented retention window prunes events by age without breaking SSE cursors or exporter replays
booked counters older than 30 days are removed by the janitor

cards.title: Interactive ask cancellation and optional bearer auth
cards.summary: S4-P3-01 = the two remaining ROADMAP Phase 0 opens: interactive asks still queue behind long workflow steps with no timeout/cancel/recoverable-task protocol (busy-hand preference or an interactive lane for source=api), and there is no optional INSTITUTE_TOKEN bearer middleware while INSTITUTE_HOST is settable.
acceptance: an interactive ask can be cancelled and does not wait 30 min on a busy hand by default
INSTITUTE_TOKEN, when set (or host != 127.0.0.1), enforces bearer auth on the API

cards.title: Deprecation, stale-comment and internal-convergence sweep
cards.summary: S4-P2-12 + S4-P1-05/02/06/07 + S4-P2-04 rolled up: burn down FastAPI lifespan/Pydantic v2/timezone-aware datetime/httpx transport deprecation warnings in batches; remove stale comments (e.g. the outdated 'A2 patch not landed' note in app/mcp.py) and re-verify README/CLAUDE/test-mount claims; converge internal APIs — public scheduler.inflight_jobs(), scorecard_time config instead of hardcoded 00:05, shared sync/stream ask prepare helper, one shared price helper for _usable_price/_adj_close. Facts-only sweep, never mixed with feature patches.
acceptance: deprecation warnings reduced batch by batch with no behavior change
stale comments/docs corrected against current code
shutdown stops probing APScheduler private structures

cards.title: Prompt overrides: data-driven prompt iteration
cards.summary: prompt_overrides table (shadow/active/retired per scope), resolve() over prompt constants with byte-stable defaults, ops API + diff preview (ROADMAP Phase 2).
acceptance: active override wins, shadow records only
defaults byte-identical without overrides
lifecycle transitions are conditional claims

cards.title: Chain properties with supersede/conflict adjudication
cards.summary: chain_properties + hybrid supersede/conflict, conflicts surface as operator actions transactionally, late-period assertions cannot regress current (ROADMAP Phase 4).
acceptance: conflict rows pair with an operator action atomically
late assertions only touch their period
tick cursor never loses assertions nor replays model calls

cards.title: Portfolios L1-L3 and Sunday proposer
cards.summary: Per-analyst conviction-tiered virtual portfolios with Sunday 22:00 proposer and conditional-claim adjudication (ROADMAP Phase 5).
acceptance: forecast routes to highest passing tier
proposal per (portfolio, work_date) is idempotent
adjudication re-checks liveness per item

cards.title: Favorites and Insights visualizations
cards.summary: Global favorites (migration 0031) + zero-dependency Insights charts page; star buttons on Trees/Forecasts (ROADMAP Phase 7).
acceptance: favorite add is idempotent
charts aggregate live API data with no new deps

cards.title: Forecast ledger integrity: evidence chain, exactly-once extract, hard boundaries
cards.summary: System-fixed knowledge cutoff persisted per settlement (migration 0033), single PIT snapshot + benchmark alignment fail-closed, deterministic extract replay, made_at tolerance + backfill origin, cap switch removed (adversarial audit findings).
acceptance: settle ignores caller-supplied as_of
extract survives claim/create crash without loss
backfilled forecasts excluded from performance scopes
aggregate caps cannot be disabled

cards.title: Factcheck trust boundary: strict verdicts, consistency gate, lease tokens, dispute outbox
cards.summary: Ambiguous verdicts fall to UNVERIFIABLE, evidence required for actionable verdicts, similarity reuse gated on numeric/date/negation consistency, lease_id ownership (migration 0034), dispute events via durable outbox (adversarial audit findings).
acceptance: conflicting verdicts never mint DISPUTED
no-evidence verdicts are not actionable
stale workers lose the lease
dispute events survive crash via outbox

cards.title: executor 锁顺序：先 hand 锁后信号量
cards.summary: 等 hand 锁的任务不再白占全局并发槽饿死空闲 hand；锁序 _hand_lock→_sem，无 ABBA。
acceptance: 忙 hand + 排队任务时空闲 hand 的 submit 不被阻塞

cards.title: operator 路由毒行写占位 disposition
cards.summary: 路由失败/解析异常写占位 shadow disposition 占掉 propose-once 名额，堵死同一 action 无限重选烧配额。
acceptance: 失败 action 不被第二次重选
占位行 shadow=1 且不可消费

cards.title: factcheck 毒卡片 attempts 上界
cards.summary: fact_cards.attempts 失败自增，3 次后条件宣占转终态 unverifiable；picker 按 attempts 沉底排除。
acceptance: 毒卡 N 次后不再被选中并落终态
预算耗尽的释放不计数

cards.title: chain 游标持久化失败有界跳过
cards.summary: 确定性持久化失败按事件计数，3 次后开 failed_run 卡并推进游标，单毒事件模型花费封顶 3 次。
acceptance: 毒事件有限次后跳过不无限重付模型调用

cards.title: research_tree 终态守卫与崩溃安全宣告
cards.summary: _maybe_finish_tree 加 NOT EXISTS 守卫防 retry 竞态静默 prune；tree.completed 改 emit 成功后置位 announced_at。
acceptance: retry 节点不被静默 prune
emit 前崩溃事件不永久丢失

cards.title: operator 自改进链幂等重放与楼层只升
cards.summary: approved+applied=0 允许幂等重放 apply；陈旧 set_parameter 提案 apply 时校验 new_floor>当前否则拒绝。
acceptance: approve 后 apply 失败可重放不卡死
陈旧提案不能批降 confidence_floor

cards.title: fact_extract_queue worker lease
cards.summary: 认领写随机 lease_id，终态写带 AND lease_id=?，stale 回收清 lease，老 worker 迟到写自然丢失。
acceptance: 过期重开后旧 worker 迟到写入不覆盖新 claim

cards.title: 事件循环阻塞三处搬离/加界
cards.summary: P8a vault 扫描合并单遍进 to_thread；P8b _auto_cluster 加 LIMIT 200+30 天老化；P8c opener 限 50 候选 + get_last_bar_pit 单行读替代全历史扫描。
acceptance: 三处同步阻塞不再冻结事件循环
扫描有界

cards.title: janitor 一致性备份 VACUUM INTO
cards.summary: 备份改 VACUUM INTO 临时文件+原子改名的一致性快照，并发 checkpoint 不再损坏备份；失败隔离不影响 janitor 其余步骤。
acceptance: 备份是有效一致的 sqlite 快照
备份失败不毒化 janitor

cards.title: 低危修补 A（operator/factcheck）
cards.summary: operator sweep 开卡上限 20 + 陈旧观察快照 7 天过滤；factcheck outbox CAS 失配重读、主 tick 异常交 @metered、向量扫描加 LIMIT 2000。
acceptance: 各低危路径有界，不静默吞异常

cards.title: 低危修补 B（chain/paper_book/scheduler/mailbox）
cards.summary: chain _auto_promote 每轮 20 上限 + artifact 读 512KB 钳制；paper_book opened 事件 ref 改 position id + benchmark 损坏 fail-closed + opened_at 逐笔取时；scheduler revival LIMIT 50；mailbox sweep 封顶 20。
acceptance: 各有界性修补生效，消费方不受 ref 改动破坏

cards.title: 收尾：CLAUDE.md 硬规则 + backlog 补卡 + 全量
cards.summary: CLAUDE.md 新增硬规则 11（失败重试必须带 attempts/lease 上界）；本清单 12 包补卡；权威全量 1078 passed / 1 skipped + compileall。
acceptance: 硬规则落地
全量绿
